close_reason: Implemented epoch validation for next_commit_version and report_successful_commit. Client API updated with optional epoch parameter.
description:
Modify sequencer to validate epoch on all operations:

1. get_commit_version (transaction ID allocation) - must include epoch, reject if mismatch
2. report_successful_commit (state update) - must include epoch, reject if mismatch

The epoch must match whatever the sequencer was configured with at boot time. This prevents stale/future generation proxies from corrupting state.

Part of minimal TSL work - proxies will have epoch at bootstrap and pass it through to sequencer calls.
title: Sequencer requires epoch for transaction ID and state updates
